## What happened

## Reproduction

<!-- Exact command(s) you ran. Include flags. -->

```bash
sentrysearch ...
```

## Environment

- **OS:** <!-- e.g. macOS / Linux / Windows -->
- **Python:** <!-- `python --version` -->
- **SentrySearch version / commit:** <!-- `sentrysearch --version` or git SHA -->
- **Install command:** <!-- e.g. `uv tool install ".[local]"` -->
- **Backend:** <!-- gemini / local / qwen-cloud -->
- **Model (if local):** <!-- qwen2b / qwen8b, quantized? -->
- **Hardware (if local backend):** <!-- e.g. M2 Max 32 GB / RTX 4090 24 GB / CPU only -->

## Footage details

<!-- If the bug is index/search/highlights/overlay related: -->

- **Source:** <!-- Tesla Sentry Mode / Tesla driving / other dashcam / generic mp4 -->
- **Tesla firmware (if applicable):** <!-- e.g. 2025.44.25 -->
- **Approx duration / resolution:** <!-- e.g. 1 min @ 1280x960 -->
